title:
Steelfixer Formworker Concreter civil supervisor
Steelfixer Formworker Concreter civil supervisor
description:
About the job
Company Description
 
Carrabay is a pioneering construction solutions provider in Australia, renowned for bridging the gap between unreliable reinforcement suppliers and construction contractors. With a multidisciplinary team encompassing over 100 FRP tradespeople, detailing and manufacturing experts, and management staff, we deliver exceptional service across all project stages. Our portfolio boasts some of Australia's largest civil infrastructure projects, supported by an innovative business model and strict quality control standards. From cutting and bending reinforcing steel to offering full turnkey FRP packages from our state-of-the-art facilities in Sydney, Brisbane and Adelaide, we ensure efficient fabrication, timely delivery, and precise execution for our clients.

 Role Description
 
We are seeking a dedicated Steelfixer Formworker Concreter Civil Supervisor for a full-time, on-site role based in Adelaide, S.A.. The supervisor will oversee daily construction activities, ensuring proper coordination and quality of rebar installation, formwork, and concreting works. Responsibilities include supervising teams, managing project timelines, adhering to safety protocols, and maintaining work standards according to designs and specifications. Strong leadership and communication are key to fostering effective collaboration across teams and ensuring project success.

 Qualifications
 
Experience and proficiency with Power Tools and basic formwork and concrete techniques
Solid knowledge and hands-on expertise in formwork systems, concrete and steel fixing processes
Understanding and implementation of Fall Protection measures
Strong leadership, problem-solving, and team management skills
Commitment to workplace health and safety practices
Relevant certifications or training in construction safety civil works.
Proven experience in similar civil construction supervisory roles
